title: Evangelion H Special
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion [H] "Special" Post by MasterOfPuppets » Sat Jan 02, 2010 10:35 pm Has anyone ever seen an unsubbed version of it? I'm looking for one now, and not really for the reasons you are thinking, more or less for collectors interest in a quality version. I also heard there is a version without the mouse in the upper, right hand corner. Any truth to that?

[]: Post by Xard » Sun Jan 03, 2010 10:21 am You're talking about the "half official" (made by some staff members who had been kicked out or were kicked out because of this, I can't remember) hentai flick? I've seen it and it's quite hilarious

[]: Post by Allemann » Sun Jan 03, 2010 10:25 am I'm only aware of one hentai Evangelion video - the one whose footage was used for an AMV to a NIN song.

[]: Post by Xard » Sun Jan 03, 2010 10:35 am Allemann wrote: I'm only aware of one hentai Evangelion video - the one whose footage was used for an AMV to a NIN song.

[]: Post by Allemann » Sun Jan 03, 2010 10:39 am Xard wrote: The horrible animation quality is propably the biggest funny factor in it

[]: Post by ZapX » Sun Jan 03, 2010 12:10 pm Please don't ask where to find porn on the forums. Read the rules.
